*** 6 FATAL, 70 INJ *** THE TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN 2 MILES SOUTH OF APLINGTON...THEN TRACKED EAST THROUGH PARKERSBURG AND JUST NORTH OF NEW HARTFORD...THEN ACROSS NORTHERN BLACKHAWK COUNTY BEFORE LIFTING NEAR THE BLACKHAWK BUCHANAN COUNTY LINE. THE PRELIMINARY SURVEY INDICATES POTENTIAL TORNADO INTENSITY OF GREATER THAN EF3...WITH POTENTIAL WINDS GREATER THAN 165 MPH. ADDITIONAL DETAILS WILL BE ADDED TUESDAY ALONG WITH FINAL EF SCALE RATING RESULTS. FATALITY AND INJURY TOTALS ARE PRELIMINARY.
